data.value: Invalid FOR statement found before NEXT

data.name: ERR_MSG_CANNOT_EXECUTE_BECAUSE_NO_DATA
data.value: Cannot execute because there is no data

data.name: ERR_MSG_COMPUTE_MA_NOT_ALLOWED
data.value: A variable for an answer type other than[{0}] cannot be specified.

data.name: ERR_MSG_COMPUTE_NOT_NUMERIC
data.value: {0} processing includes a data that cannot be calculated. Continue? New variable name: [{1}]

data.name: ERR_MSG_COUNT_PARAM_OVERLAP
data.value: The parameter of {0} is not set properly or the answer type is invalid when a variable is set.

data.name: ERR_MSG_DATAPROCESS_VALIDATION_CRITERIA_VARIABLE_NOT_SET
data.value: A variable used for the criteria is not set properly

data.name: ERR_MSG_DATAPROCESS_VALIDATION_CRITERIA_VARIABLE_PARAM_MISSING
data.value: A variable used for the criteria is not set properly

data.name: ERR_MSG_DATAPROCESS_VALIDATION_DIRECTION
data.value: The "Direction" column for data processing is not set

data.name: ERR_MSG_DATAPROCESS_VALIDATION_EMPTY
data.value: Not found executable data processing entries

data.name: ERR_MSG_DATAPROCESS_VALIDATION_ERROR_JOINT
data.value: The sum of the number of choices for a parameter exceeds the number of choices for a substitution parameter

data.name: ERR_MSG_DATAPROCESS_VALIDATION_ERROR_NOT_SET
data.value: is not set properly or the answer type is invalid when a variable is set.

data.name: ERR_MSG_DATAPROCESS_VALIDATION_ERROR_NOT_SET_MCONVERT
data.value: The parameter of {0} is not set properly or the answer type is invalid when a variable is set.

data.value: A processing operator is not set

data.name: ERR_MSG_DATAPROCESS_VALIDATION_VARIABLE
data.value: A variable to be processed is not set

data.name: ERR_MSG_INEQUALITY_SIGN_CANNOT_BE_USED_MA_FA
